description: User hovers the cursor over the 'AI Interview' task type chip in the Filter Opportunities modal.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'AI Interview' filter option within the task type section of the modal.

description: The screen transitions to a solid grey state, indicating a significant UI change, modal dismissal, or loading period.
frame_description: The entire screen area is filled with a uniform grey color.

description: The Filter Opportunities modal reappears on the screen with the cursor still positioned in the same location.
frame_description: The filter modal is visible again after the brief grey screen state.
